Class BratDocument

java.lang.Object
opennlp.tools.formats.brat.BratDocument
public class BratDocument extends Object
Brat (brat rapid annotation tool) is based on the stav visualiser which was originally made in order to visualise BioNLP'11 Shared Task data.

Data can be found on this web site.

Information about the format are found on this web site.
